pullRequest.title: feat: add explicit space parameters to FAdxSmaStrategy
pullRequest.body:
## Summary

Fix FAdxSmaStrategy parameter space detection issue by adding explicit space parameters to hyperoptable parameters that don't follow naming conventions.

Solve the issue: #324

## Quick strategy idea

- Add space='buy' to adx_period, sma_short_period, and sma_long_period parameters in FAdxSmaStrategy.py
